# guardicore_label (Data Source)

Reads a label from Akamai Guardicore Segmentation.

Use this data source to reference existing labels, including system-managed labels that cannot be modified by Terraform. The `system_managed` attribute indicates whether the label is managed by the platform.

## Example Usage

```terraform
# Look up a label by ID.
data "guardicore_label" "by_id" {
  id = "00000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000001"
}

# Look up a label by key and value.
data "guardicore_label" "environment_production" {
  key   = "Environment"
  value = "Production"
}

output "label_lookup_by_key_value" {
  value = {
    id    = data.guardicore_label.environment_production.id
    key   = data.guardicore_label.environment_production.key
    value = data.guardicore_label.environment_production.value
  }
}

output "label_criteria" {
  value = data.guardicore_label.by_id.criteria
}

# Look up a system-managed label.
# System-managed labels are created by the platform and cannot be modified
# by Terraform. The system_managed attribute indicates this.
data "guardicore_label" "agent_installed" {
  key   = "Agent"
  value = "Installed"
}

output "label_system_managed" {
  value = data.guardicore_label.agent_installed.system_managed
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `id` (String) The unique identifier of the label. Either id or both key and value must be specified.
- `key` (String) The key (category) of the label. Used together with value to look up a label.
- `value` (String) The value of the label. Used together with key to look up a label.

### Read-Only

- `criteria` (Attributes Set) Dynamic criteria for automatic label assignment. Criteria are emitted as an unordered set to avoid drift from API ordering differences. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--criteria))
- `managed_by` (String) Identifies who manages this label. `terraform` for user-managed labels, or the system origin (e.g., `system`).
- `system_managed` (Boolean) Whether this label is system-managed. System-managed labels cannot be updated or deleted by Terraform. Use the `guardicore_label` data source to reference them.

<a id="nestedatt--criteria"></a>
### Nested Schema for `criteria`

Read-Only:

- `argument` (String) The argument to match against.
- `compound_criteria` (Attributes Set) Nested criteria matched as an unordered compound group. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--criteria--compound_criteria))
- `field` (String) The field to match against (e.g., 'name', 'ip', 'os_name', 'process_name').
- `op` (String) The operator for matching (e.g., 'EQUALS', 'CONTAINS', 'STARTSWITH', 'ENDSWITH').

<a id="nestedatt--criteria--compound_criteria"></a>
### Nested Schema for `criteria.compound_criteria`

Read-Only:

- `argument` (String) The argument to match against.
- `field` (String) The field to match against.
- `op` (String) The operator for matching.
